governing_requirement: MaskFactory must ingest authenticated replay-protected downstream repair/quality feedback, resolve every binding to the exact current parent and immutable evidence, enforce distinct material hypotheses and bounded progress, then deterministically reject, retain for mining, or create a new candidate without mutating accepted packages/certificates or creating truth authority.
prerequisites: MF-P6-11.01 has no accepted external adapter/conformance boundary.
MF-P6-10.06 has no accepted append-only publication ledger for durable intake/lifecycle events.
MF-P6-08.06 has no accepted bounded autonomous repair executor to consume an accepted child hypothesis.
verified_foundations: The frozen strict feedback schema binds parent receipt/request, release/capability/semantic profile/policy/certificate/source/media/subject/provider/output/protected/transform/QA/authority evidence, typed defects, a material hypothesis, requested action, retry/progress budgets, and explicit authority firewalls.

Feedback validation verifies canonical payload hash, trusted consumer_feedback Ed25519 role, authentication/nonce shape, output/protected disjointness, exact retry arithmetic, no-progress abstention, advisory/no-mutation/no-escalation constants, parent receipt/request/release/output/transform/QA/authority/source/media identity, distinct parent hypothesis, and optional exact certificate binding.
The generic record batch validator detects reused authentication nonce with different payload bytes.
The lifecycle event vocabulary reserves repair_requested, repair_feedback_accepted, repair_feedback_rejected, and repair_completed with producer ownership of acceptance/rejection/completion.
Focused feedback/error/idempotency and lifecycle vocabulary tests, Ruff, and schema parsing pass.

commands: trusted re-sign probes against exact parent request/receipt/certificate plus generic batch idempotency validation

trusted_resign_probes.gap: Provider binding is not resolved to the parent receipt provider or current provider state.
Subject/owner/person assignment is not compared with the exact parent request/receipt.
Feedback policy is a declaration and is not resolved to an accepted current policy or parent use-eligibility policy.

trusted_resign_probes.mutation: Remove every protected_artifact_binding and trusted re-sign.
trusted_resign_probes.gap: Protected input scope is not required to equal the parent protected lineage.

trusted_resign_probes.mutation: Replace qa_binding.blocking_failure_ids with invented-defect and trusted re-sign.
trusted_resign_probes.gap: Only the QA report hash is compared; claimed failure identities are not resolved to report contents.

trusted_resign_probes.mutation: Create a second trusted-signed body with the same feedback_id and identical hypothesis but a changed defect observation and fresh nonce.
trusted_resign_probes.gap: No feedback-ID/idempotency ledger or cross-feedback hypothesis history rejects same-ID/different-body collision or duplicate material hypothesis.

confirmed_gaps: No production feedback intake API/CLI or atomic append-only feedback ledger exists.

Single-document validation can be called without parent/current evidence; no intake transaction makes parent request, receipt, certificate, release, capability, policy, provider, QA, and revocation resolution mandatory.
Subject, provider, policy, protected artifacts, semantic profile, QA failure IDs, defect observation bytes, and material-change bytes are not resolved against authoritative evidence.
No stable idempotency identity covers feedback_id plus canonical body; same-ID/different-body and repeated same hypothesis with a new nonce are accepted.
No cross-attempt ledger enforces hypothesis uniqueness/material change, attempt caps, no-progress history, and one terminal abstention across the complete parent chain.
No deterministic producer decision records accepted, rejected, mining_only, candidate_created, or quarantine outcome with exact reasons and current heads.
No immutable candidate transaction proves accepted feedback creates a new child request/candidate while leaving parent package, masks, certificate, truth tier, and authority bytes unchanged.
No unauthorized-write, concurrent intake, crash-boundary, stale-parent, revocation-race, conflicting-observation, replay, or mining/repair integration drills exist.

implementation_packet.objective: Implement an additive fail-closed producer feedback intake/decision ledger over the frozen feedback document, resolving all current evidence and creating only immutable child candidates while preserving parent truth and authority.
implementation_packet.path_state: All five allowed paths are absent and clean. Candidate paths are read-only. The scope is disjoint from frozen v1 contracts, preserved MF-P6-08.05 dirty paths, and prepared MF-P6-11.01 through 11.04 paths.
validator_commands: python -m pytest -q tests/test_bridge_feedback_intake.py tests/test_mask_bridge_contracts_v1.py -k 'feedback or repair or idempotency or replay'
python -m ruff check src/maskfactory/bridge/feedback_intake.py tools/intake_bridge_feedback.py tests/test_bridge_feedback_intake.py
acceptance_criteria: Require and resolve exact current trusted parent request/receipt/certificate, release/capability/semantic profile/policy/provider/QA/revocation documents and their actual evidence bytes before any decision.

Recompute subject/owner/person assignment, every output/protected artifact, transform, QA failure, defect observation, material-change, authority, and intended-use binding; signed declarations cannot override observed evidence.
Use an atomic feedback ledger keyed by feedback_id and canonical body hash: same ID/body returns the prior decision, same ID/different body fails, and nonce/signature replay rules remain enforced.

Track hypothesis IDs and material-change hashes across the complete project/run/pass parent chain; duplicate or immaterial hypotheses fail and attempt/no-progress caps deterministically quarantine and abstain.

Issue a producer decision of rejected, mining_only, candidate_created, or quarantine_and_abstain with exact policy/reason/evidence and current journal heads; feedback alone never creates truth or authority.

Candidate creation writes only a new immutable child request/candidate/hypothesis with exact parent hashes; accepted parent package, artifacts, certificates, truth tier, and authority remain byte-identical.
Append producer-owned repair_feedback_accepted/rejected and later repair_completed events atomically with receipt-last checkpoint/idempotency semantics without impersonating Main signatures.
Mining retains advisory observations in a separately governed non-gold corpus and cannot silently enter training gold, operational certificate evidence, or production masks.

Fault tests cover forgery, stale/revoked parent, provider/policy/subject/protected/QA drift, same-ID collision, nonce replay, duplicate/immaterial hypothesis, cap/no-progress, conflicting observations, concurrent intake, crash boundaries, unauthorized writes, and parent byte preservation.
Frozen v1 contracts, preserved dirty paths, and unrelated worker/runtime state remain byte-identical.

claim_boundary: This audit credits the strict signed feedback schema and single-document semantic validator only. It does not ingest or decide production feedback, prove replay-safe current-state resolution, create a child candidate, preserve a parent through a write transaction, or complete MF-P6-11.05.
